results.title: Glasgow University announces new sustainability initiative
results.description: The University of Glasgow has launched a campus-wide programme to cut carbon emissions by 2030.

results.title: West End food festival returns this spring
results.description: Byres Road will host street food and live music for the annual Glasgow West End festival.

results.title: New cycling lanes to connect city centre and Partick
results.description: Glasgow City Council has approved funding for dedicated cycle routes along the Kelvin corridor.

results.title: Student housing demand rises as semester starts
results.description: Private landlords report high occupancy for flats near Glasgow universities.

results.title: Kelvingrove Park events programme 2025
results.description: Free concerts and family activities will run in Kelvingrove Park from April to September.
